title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 320.260 - Office space to be provided
text:
320.260.  Office space to be provided. — The division of facilities management, design and construction shall provide office space for the state fire marshal and his or her employees.
(L. 1972 S.B. 487 § 13, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision)
